highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

overview.about: Central South Malta Old Town is one of MT's most celebrated city destination destinations, located in South Malta, MT. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.desc: A skyline recognised across the globe — towers, bridges and boulevards that define an entire era of human design
